description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Metagraph C++ CI that runs on every push. Use two jobs, build-linux and build-macos, to build and test Metagraph on Ubuntu and macOS. In the build-linux job, use a matrix strategy to test with different build types and compilers, and install dependencies, submodules, and libraries. Configure, build, and run unit tests and integration tests for Metagraph on both Linux and macOS.
